title: Maximum Profit of Operating a Centennial Wheel
hints: Notice that profit changes linearly with each rotation once all customers have arrived; consider what happens to the waiting queue after the input list ends.
Simulate the process rotation by rotation, tracking the cumulative waiting customers and the current total profit at each step.
If the net gain per rotation is non-positive after all arrivals, profit can never increase further; otherwise, find the earliest rotation with the highest profit seen so far.
